posts.author: Valeriia.H (Valeriia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community!

How can i build page like this?
https://view.monday.com/4015407657-9dff8a88ed4926a3d6faddc75a4732f9?r=use1&_ga=2.251141956.377695695.1707829531-1570320680.1681387388

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Valeriia.H,

That looks like a regular monday workdoc.

You need to create the doc, and then click on “Share” and then on " Share Doc publicly". Just in case, it is not available for all plans.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Valeriia.H (Valeriia)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @Matias.Monday
